channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Git Arborist - Thu Jun 25 02:58:33 UTC 2026
item.description:
Git Arborist makes Git worktrees first-class inside JetBrains IDEs. Create, open, and manage worktrees from a dedicated tool window, the Git menu, and the Project View...
vendor: Tom Larcher downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.tomlarcher.gitarborist

item.title: AtomCode - Thu Jun 25 02:05:24 UTC 2026
item.description:
AtomCode brings a local AI coding agent into JetBrains IDEs. Use AtomCode from a dedicated tool window, editor context actions, and intentions to explain, fix...
vendor: AtomCode downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.atomcode.jetbrains

item.title: Matugen Dynamic Color Scheme - Wed Jun 24 22:16:19 UTC 2026
item.description:
Dynamically applies IDE editor color schemes from a watched config file generated by matugen (Material You color generation). Point the plugin at your matugen output...
vendor: motor downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.matugen.theme

item.title: Show in Explorer - Wed Jun 24 07:04:09 UTC 2026
item.description:
A small tool used to open the current file explorer location. After installation, there will be an icon on the right side of the menu bar. Click it, or use the...
vendor: Xinjin Chen downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.cxj.plugin.show-in-explorer

item.title: DiffGuard - Wed Jun 24 07:46:00 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: DiffGuard downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.diffguard

item.title: Api2Sql - Thu Jun 25 05:34:59 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: luyiming downloads: 0 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: com.ming.scriptdock.ScriptDock

item.title: Thrift Hero - Wed Jun 24 23:34:14 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Show Contributors - Wed Jun 24 15:45:57 UTC 2026

vendor: Wilson Stevan downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.wilsonhub.showcontributors

item.title: H-Codex - Wed Jun 24 20:46:23 UTC 2026
item.description:
H-Codex launches OpenAI Codex in the IntelliJ IDEA terminal using the shell configured for the current project. Report problems in the public H-Codex issue tracker.
vendor: Hackus downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.hackus.hcodex

item.title: WSL Remote Companion - Wed Jun 24 18:46:45 UTC 2026
item.description:
Small quality-of-life helpers for JetBrains Remote Development over WSL. When the IDE backend runs on WSL (Linux), IntelliJ hides the actions that reach the Windows...
vendor: Maxime HAMM downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.nimbly.remotedev
